name: Shaved Fennel with Blood Oranges, Pomegranate
recipeIngredient: 2 large round bulbs of fennel, trimmed, rinsed and dried
4 large blood oranges, zest removed, seeds extracted
recipeInstructions:
1. Shave fennel on a mandolin or slicer to 1/32 inch thick and toss with lemon juice in a large metal mixing bowl.
2. Add extra virgin olive oil and set aside in the refrigerator.
3. Remove pith and skin from blood oranges, cut into segments, and remove seeds, saving all juices.
4. Toss the orange segments into the bowl with fennel, add pomegranates, and gently toss to mix.
5. Arrange 4 tall piles of the mixture in 4 separate plates.
6. Shave pecorino over top of each plate and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
